name: Placeholders and Vanish Input
description: An animated input field that cycles through placeholder text with a typing effect, and when submitted, the text vanishes with a particle animation.
whenToUse: Use for search bars, contact forms, or hero section inputs where you want animated cycling placeholders and a dramatic submit animation.

props.name: placeholders
props.description: Array of placeholder texts to cycle through

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the input value changes

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Callback fired when the form is submitted
